overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking down a rain-soaked commercial boulevard at night in Los Santos. The scene features prominent neon billboards, the iconic Vinewood sign in the distance, and wet pavement reflecting the colorful city lights during a thunderstorm.

events.description: lightning flash briefly illuminates the rainy street scene

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily down the wet sidewalk following two pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in checkered shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk
second pedestrian walking further ahead near the street corner

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow structural column at the building corner
illuminated storefront sign with purple neon lettering
large vertical billboard with bright pink and purple advertisements
iconic white hillside sign visible between the buildings in the distance
rain-soaked pavement reflecting the neon lights and street lamps
tall palm trees lining the street against the night sky
tall street light illuminating the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking past a corner building with a distinctive yellow column and neon 'Queens' sign. Rain falls steadily on the wet sidewalk as two pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction. A flash of lightning briefly illuminates the scene around the 3.5-second mark, highlighting the neon billboards and the distant Vinewood sign.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk down the street and approaching the two pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in checkered shirt now closer and walking to the left side of the path

entered.detail: modern shop windows with illuminated displays and advertisements
multi-story building with lit windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open commercial boulevard, having passed the initial corner building. Glass storefronts line the left side while the large pink billboard remains visible on the right. The two pedestrians ahead grow closer as the camera advances, and the Vinewood sign becomes slightly more prominent in the center distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection approach with prominent landmark view

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection with the Vinewood sign clearly visible ahead

entered.detail: skyscraper with illuminated red accent lighting rising behind the Vinewood sign
illuminated traffic signal visible ahead at the intersection
white painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed the pedestrians, the character approaches a major intersection with an unobstructed view of the Vinewood sign centered in the distance. The street opens up wider, revealing a tall office tower with red lighting behind the sign. Traffic lights and crosswalk markings become visible as the camera moves toward the intersection, while the rain continues to fall on the reflective pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked commercial boulevard that gradually opens up to reveal a wide city intersection and a distant landmark. It begins by following a character past a corner building marked by a yellow column and a neon Queens sign, while a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the falling rain and the far-off Vinewood sign. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward an open stretch of the boulevard lined with glass storefronts and a large pink billboard, drawing closer to two pedestrians walking ahead. The perspective then expands as the character passes the pedestrians and approaches a major intersection, where the reflective pavement leads toward a centered view of the Vinewood sign. Finally, the view widens to reveal a tall office tower with red lighting standing behind the sign as the camera moves toward the traffic lights and crosswalks.
